headline: Nordson Corporation Announces Earnings Release and Webcast for Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026
summary: WESTLAKE, Ohio, April 30, 2026--Nordson Corporation (Nasdaq: NDSN) today announced it will release second quarter fiscal year 2026 earnings on May 20, 2026, after the close of the market. Nordson will host its quarterly webcast on:
